title: Better Chest Drops
description: With this mod you can drop all items from a chest at once
body:
This a mod where you can drop all items from a chest at once !
**FEATURES**
- Drop all :
With this you drop everthing from the chest at once

- Drop match: 
If you want to only drop a specific item , just write it in the box above "Drop match" and press enter or the button.![Menu]

- Settings:
You can open settings with a hotkey (which you can choose in the minecraft settings) or with the settings button when you open a chest. In settings you can right click something to see the explanation what it does. 

-Timing:
You can choose between "Ticks" and "All" . You can change the ticks in the settings. 
This can help reduce lag and also it can work on servers where the items are not allowed to drop to fast.




**If you find bugs, please report them in the discord server!**
